texts.label: text
texts.orig: At Lalashe Maasai Mara all our Reservations Staff love what they do; To Plan, Guide ,Book our guests to our camps and lodges and ensure their stay is a  memorable one from day one to the very last day of Stay with us.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Our reservations office will always be available for bookings or enquiries from 0700Hours to 2200Hours  East  Africa  Time  Zone  Eastern  Africa Time - EAT Time Zone (timeanddate.com)
